description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a prominent pistol grip and a long, flat-top upper receiver with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with basic iron sights at both the front and rear. The handguard is sleek and extends nearly the full length of the barrel, providing ample space for grip and accessory attachment. The magazine well is clearly defined, and the magazine itself is rectangular and detachable. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and modularity.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. It features a long handguard, pistol grip, and a flat-top receiver with a Picatinny rail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and the full length of the handguard and receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's end, rear sight, and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
